name: Bivalve Flavored Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound thick sliced Polish ham, diced
A lot of red-skinned potatoes -- washed well and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow or deep baking dish, layer the onions, green pepper, celery, shucked oysters (including shell liquor if present), ham, scallops, and potatoes in that order.
2. Scatter the chopped parsley, thyme, and black pepper throughout the layered ingredients during assembly.
3. Cover the dish tightly with plastic film.
4. Place the dish in a microwave set to medium power and cook for a period of time sufficient to lightly cook the celery.
5. In a tightly closed jar, mix 3 teaspoons of flour with a few tablespoons of cold water until well combined.
6. Pour the flour mixture evenly over the cooked ingredients in the dish, stirring gently.
7. Add enough light cream to bring the liquid level slightly below the surface of the mix.
8. Sprinkle a generous layer of bread crumbs on top.
9. Place the dish uncovered in a preheated oven and bake until the juices bubble around the edges and the surface is nicely browned.
